rows.description: N.B. Some of y^e foregoing of these accounts, except against Thompsons & P^d Scemble, which they desire may be left f^r further Consideration. Thompsons Bill which was paid by y^e s^d last Rector in y^e year 1749 amounting to 9 - 7 - 9 2/d is y^e sum excepted against. y^e Parson excepted against.
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for comprehensive description of the vertical marginal note. `row_type` 'entry' is used as it describes a specific financial annotation related to accounts, including an embedded amount. Visual verification confirms the text is challenging but gemini-flash's transcription appears thorough. Confidence adjusted to reflect legibility challenges.
rows.section_header: Nov^r: 2. 1750. Prædictus Computus examinatus et approbatus per Præsentes, viz:
rows.english_description: Note reserving further consideration of certain foregoing accounts; Thompson's bill (paid by the late Rector in 1749) and the account of P. Scemble are excepted from approval.
